executives.name: Gregg Lowe
executives.background: Gregg A. Lowe joined Wolfspeed in September 2017 as President and Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors. Prior to joining Wolfspeed, Mr. Lowe served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Freescale Semiconductor, Ltd. from 2012 until its merger with NXP Semiconductors N.V. in 2015. He previously held various executive positions at Texas Instruments Incorporated.

executives.name: Neill Reynolds
executives.background: Neill P. Reynolds joined Wolfspeed in August 2018 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to joining Wolfspeed, Mr. Reynolds served as Senior Vice President of Finance, Strategy and Corporate Development at NXP Semiconductors N.V. and held various finance leadership roles at General Electric Company.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Elif Balkas
executives.background: Dr. Elif Balkas joined Wolfspeed in 2006 and has served as Chief Technology Officer since 2022. She previously served as Vice President of R&D and has held various leadership roles in the company's materials and power business units.

executives.name: Bradley Kohn
executives.background: Bradley D. Kohn joined Wolfspeed in 2013 and serves as General Counsel and Secretary. Prior to joining Wolfspeed, he was General Counsel at Solarflare Communications and held legal roles at Broadcom Corporation.

executives.name: Glenda Dorchak
executives.background: Former executive at IBM, Intel, and Spansion. She has significant experience in the semiconductor and technology sectors.

executives.name: John Replogle
executives.background: John B. Replogle has served as a director since 2014. He is a partner at Raleigh Group and previously served as CEO of Seventh Generation, Inc. and Burt's Bees.

executives.name: Stacy Smith
executives.background: Stacy J. Smith joined the board in 2023. He previously served as Executive Chairman of Autodesk, Inc. and was the CFO of Intel Corporation.

executives.name: Thomas Seifert
executives.background: Thomas Seifert has served as our Chief Financial Officer since June 2017. From December 2012 to April 2017, Mr. Seifert served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Symantec Corporation, a cybersecurity software and services company. From 2009 to 2012, Mr. Seifert served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., a semiconductor company. From 2008 to 2009, Mr. Seifert served as Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer of Qimonda AG, a German memory chip manufacturer. Mr. Seifert currently serves on the board of directors of First Solar, Inc., a solar energy solutions company. Mr. Seifert holds a B.A. and an M.B.A. from Friedrich-Alexander University and an M.A. in Economics from Wayne State University.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Werner
board_of_directors.background: Thomas H. Werner has served as Chairman of the Board since 2023. He was previously the CEO of SunPower Corporation and held leadership roles at Silicon Light Machines and 3Com Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Gregg Lowe
board_of_directors.background: Gregg A. Lowe joined Wolfspeed in September 2017 as President and Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors.

board_of_directors.name: Glenda Dorchak
board_of_directors.background: Glenda M. Dorchak has served as a director since 2019. She has held executive positions at Spansion, Inc., QLogic Corporation, and Intel Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: John Replogle
board_of_directors.background: John B. Replogle has served as a director since 2014. He is a partner at Raleigh Group and previously served as CEO of Seventh Generation, Inc. and Burt's Bees.

board_of_directors.background: Thomas Seifert has served as our Chief Financial Officer since June 2017. From December 2012 to April 2017, Mr. Seifert served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Symantec Corporation, a cybersecurity software and services company. From 2009 to 2012, Mr. Seifert served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., a semiconductor company. From 2008 to 2009, Mr. Seifert served as Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer of Qimonda AG, a German memory chip manufacturer. Mr. Seifert currently serves on the board of directors of First Solar, Inc., a solar energy solutions company.
